mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO df_task_node (task_id, task_version_id, node_key, node_name, node_type, component_id, ref_resource_id, ref_resource_type, config_json, input_mapping_json, output_schema_json, position_x, position_y) VALUES
(#{node.taskId}, #{node.taskVersionId}, #{node.nodeKey}, #{node.nodeName}, #{node.nodeType}, #{node.componentId}, #{node.refResourceId}, #{node.refResourceType}, #{node.configJson}, #{node.inputMappingJson}, #{node.outputSchemaJson}, #{node.positionX}, #{node.positionY})
mapper.update: UPDATE df_task_node SET deleted = 1 WHERE task_version_id = #{taskVersionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, task_version_id, node_key, node_name, node_type, component_id, ref_resource_id, ref_resource_type, config_json, input_mapping_json, output_schema_json, position_x, position_y, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM df_task_node WHERE task_version_id = #{taskVersionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
